title: Sports Equipment
editorialSummary: Equipment grouped by sport: tennis, cricket, ice hockey, archery. False trail: a bat appears in both cricket and baseball, but all items here are unambiguously cricket-specific (bat, wicket, bail, crease line is not an item — stumps are).

meta.gptRationale: Sports equipment is tangible and mostly obvious from common sports knowledge, with only a few specialist accessory terms.
